reasoning: Equities generally exhibit a slight positive drift corresponding to the equity risk premium. Over a relatively short horizon of approximately 3 months (from November 2025 to February 2026), the expected drift is small compared to the stock's volatility. A typical stock structure yields around a 53-55% chance of posting a positive return over a quarter, assuming an annualized return of ~8-10% and a volatility in the 20-30% range. Given Bunge's historically stable but commodity-linked performance, a near-baseline probability of 54% is quite reasonable.
